metadata.methodology: City-level search across major Oregon metro areas

candidates.address: 19219 68th Ave S, Ste M105, Kent, WA 98032 (serves Oregon)
candidates.notes: Exclusive Epilog Laser distributor for Washington and Oregon. Helps manufacturers, sign shops, schools, and makers choose and maintain laser systems. Serving Pacific Northwest for 8+ years. Based in Maple Valley, WA area.
Third-generation family business specializing in computer, laser, and glass engraving and awards, trophies, plaques, and signs. In business since 1967. Located at 7914 SW Barbur Blvd, Portland.
Portland laser cutting, laser engraving, CNC routing, and custom fabrication. Creative energy and professional dedication. Located in Kerns, Central Eastside, Northeast Portland.

candidates.address: 15732 SE Cordova Ct Ste 100, Milwaukie, OR 97267
candidates.notes: Portland area laser engraving services to Manufacturers, Fabricators, Inventors, and Machine Shops. Over 24 years of experience. Located in Milwaukie, Oregon.

Precision laser cutting, engraving, marking, and metal fabrication services for industrial, commercial, and design applications. Located in Portland and serves clients across the country. Founded in 2011.
Laser cutting services in Portland, Oregon. Very quick turnaround and very low prices. Very friendly service.

Unique awards and engraving provider in Springfield, Oregon (Eugene metro area). 37+ years of experience serving clients locally and nationwide. Specializes in personalized awards and engraving solutions.
Laser components, laser accessories, and laser engraved tags and gift items. Provides and distributes a wide variety of laser components. Located in Newberg, Oregon.

Family-owned business in Downtown Eugene, Oregon. Specializes in corporate quality awards including plaques, acrylics, crystal clocks, and trophies. Also offers Olhausen pool tables and billiards supplies.

Laser engraving for Central Oregon and nationwide. Engraving leather, faux leather (leatherette), metal, and glassware. Laser engraving leaves a crisp and permanent design. Servicing wholesale and promotional customer needs.
Awards and engraving services in Bend, Oregon.
Labels, engravings, stamps and more for Redmond, Bend and Central Oregon. Located in Redmond, OR.
Laser etching, cutting of shapes and patterns, text and graphics on a variety of materials. Bend, Oregon trophy and engraving shop.
Awards and engraving shop in downtown Bend, Oregon.

Family-owned and operated business established in 1965. Specializing in cast metal letters and plaques. Also manufactures photopolymer ADA signs, code required signs and directories. Many standard signs carried in stock. Serves greater Portland area, Oregon, Western Washington, the Northwest and Alaska. Dealer network throughout US.

candidates.address: 8900 SW Burnham St, Ste E109, Tigard, OR 97223
candidates.notes: Family owned business specializing in lighted signs for businesses. Also offers vinyl graphics, printing and banners. Over 50 years of experience. Located in Tigard (Portland metro).

Creates custom plaques and custom engravings using quality products. Fast, uncomplicated service. Serving Portland, Tigard, Beaverton, SW Washington, Oregon and surrounding areas. Also at 1110 Martin Luther King Blvd, Portland.
Full-service local sign company in Portland, OR. Designs and builds high-quality custom commercial business signs.
Based in Portland, Oregon, serves clients locally and across the U.S. Complete Portland custom signs and graphics consultation and design.

Direct person to person contact available by phone, email or text. No automated forms, no voice message service. Over 30 years experience. Recognized nationally by industry professionals and featured in SignCraft Magazine.
